name: Booking System
description: Calendar-based appointment booking with time slots, services, and booking management.
ai_context: This is a React + Vite booking system. Single-file App.jsx contains all logic. Features: monthly calendar view with navigation, clickable days to see/add bookings, time slot grid (9AM-5PM in 30min increments), service selection (Consultation, Follow-up, Strategy Session, Quick Call), booking form with client name/email/notes, booking list per day with status badges (confirmed/pending/cancelled), today highlighted on calendar, days with bookings get a dot indicator. All data in localStorage with sample bookings pre-loaded. The user will likely ask to: add email confirmations, connect to Google Calendar, add recurring appointments, add staff/provider selection, add payment integration, add client database, add buffer time between appointments, add timezone support, add waitlist, add SMS reminders, etc.
